pi_items.source: Cross-verified across multiple task definitions: create_sales_order and create_customer_shipment both reference 'C&W Construction' as an existing business partner in the GardenWorld sample database. The product of cross-task consistency validation indicates this is the canonical name used in the GardenWorld seed data.

Cross-verified across 8+ task definitions (configure_customer_credit_and_order, create_price_list, create_physical_inventory, create_requisition, create_material_receipt, create_inventory_move, create_customer_shipment, and create_vendor_invoice). The configure_customer_credit_and_order task explicitly lists m_product_id: 128 for 'Azalea Bush', confirming this is the exact product name and ID in the GardenWorld seed database.
Specified in task.json description and metadata. This is the required quantity for the Azalea Bush line item in this specific task instance.

Cross-verified across 6+ task definitions (create_price_list, create_physical_inventory, create_requisition, create_material_receipt, configure_product_replenishment, and create_customer_shipment). All tasks consistently reference 'Elm Tree' as an existing product in the GardenWorld seed database. The product appears in pricing tables, inventory counts, and requisition workflows.
Specified in task.json description and metadata. This is the required quantity for the Elm Tree line item in this specific task instance.

Verified from iDempiere documentation via web search. iDempiere DocStatus codes are standardized across all document types. 'CO' (Completed) is the standard two-character code for a document that has been fully processed and approved. Confirmed in official iDempiere wiki and documentation sources.

Verified as the standard client name in iDempiere's GardenWorld sample database. Confirmed in setup scripts (setup_idempiere.sh references GardenAdmin login and GardenWorld company), task_utils.sh queries for GardenWorld client, and multiple task descriptions reference 'the GardenWorld demo company' and 'GardenWorld Garden Supplies'.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The business partner 'C&W Construction' is a confirmed entity in the GardenWorld database, appearing consistently across multiple task definitions. Both products 'Azalea Bush' and 'Elm Tree' are verified as real product names in the GardenWorld seed database, with Azalea Bush confirmed to have m_product_id 128. The document status code 'CO' is verified as the standard iDempiere code for 'Completed' status. The client name 'GardenWorld' is confirmed as the correct tenant name in the iDempiere sample database. All data is synthetic, generated by iDempiere's standard GardenWorld seed database initialization process.
